tprBreak.promptText: Wave your hand for hello! Wave goodbye!

panels.narrationText: Good morning! Milo wakes up.
Hello, Bea! Hi!
How are you? I'm fine, thank you!
Bye, Bea! See you soon!

tprBreak.promptText: Show me a hug for Mommy! Wave for Grandpa!

items.distractorRationale: Same semantic field (family members, sibling pair).
Same semantic field (family members, sibling pair).

panels.narrationText: Bea Bunny's family goes to the park.
Mommy and Daddy carry the blanket.
Grandma brings the apples. Grandpa brings the bread.
Sister and brother share the fruit. Yum!

tprBreak.promptText: Touch something red in your room! Touch something blue!

tprBreak.promptText: Jump one time! Now jump three times!

panels.narrationText: Ten little ducklings live by the pond.
One, two, three jump in first.
Four, five, six paddle along.
Seven, eight, nine glide so smooth.
Ten little ducklings swim together.
Mommy duck smiles. What a happy pond!

questions.promptTranscript: How many ducks are in the pond?
